label: God of War
blurb: The Norse saga of Kratos and Atreus. Name who said the line.

quotes.hint: One word, said a thousand times, meme immortality

quotes.q: Do not be sorry. Be better.
quotes.hint: Fatherly advice after the hunt goes wrong

quotes.q: We will be the gods we choose to be. Not those who have been.
quotes.hint: Said after breaking the cycle at journey's end

quotes.q: Keep your expectations low, boy, and you will never be disappointed.
quotes.hint: Spartan wisdom about stupid pots and no treasure

quotes.q: Fate is another lie told by the gods.
I thought you'd be bigger... but you're definitely the one.
quotes.hint: The tattooed stranger knocking on the door

quotes.q: I'm dangling from the hip of the bloody Ghost of Sparta!
quotes.hint: The moment he realizes whose belt he's on

quotes.q: Well... guess we're the bad guys now.
quotes.hint: Muttered as Freya carries her son away

quotes.q: My father doesn't like people either.
quotes.hint: Bonding with the Witch of the Woods

quotes.q: If we can't bring him back to life... can I keep the head?
quotes.hint: A very practical question about Mimir

lore.question: What is the name of Kratos’ frost axe?
lore.hint: Forged by dwarven brothers as the answer to Thor’s hammer

lore.question: Among the giants, Atreus is known by what other name?
lore.hint: Revealed at the very end of the 2018 game

lore.question: Which two brothers forged the Leviathan Axe?
lore.hint: They also forged a certain hammer they regret

lore.question: What is the name of Atreus’ mother, whose ashes start the journey?
lore.hint: A giant who chose to live in Midgard

lore.question: To which realm do Kratos and Atreus carry Faye’s ashes?
lore.hint: The realm of the giants, sealed off from travelers

lore.question: Baldur is the son of which goddess?
lore.hint: The Witch of the Woods herself

lore.question: The one thing that can pierce Baldur’s invulnerability is what?
lore.hint: Atreus carries arrows fletched with it

lore.question: What is the World Serpent’s name?
lore.hint: He circles all of Midgard and speaks in rumbles

lore.question: Which chained weapons from his Greek past does Kratos keep hidden?
lore.hint: Retrieved from beneath the house when Helheim’s cold demands fire

lore.question: Who revives Mimir after Kratos frees his head?
lore.hint: She is not thrilled about what he is
